_comment: Illustrative baseline values that show the shape of the result. Replace with your own measured eval run before citing.

quality.title: Retrieval precision and answer faithfulness
quality.note: Higher is better. The grade-and-rewrite loop lifts both signals.

latency.title: Median latency per query
latency.note: The extra grading, rewriting, and occasional web-search hops roughly triple latency.

cost.title: Cost per query
cost.note: More model calls per query means proportionally higher token cost.
